cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees consistently praise the company for its generous compensation, stock options, and high-quality office perks.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some reviews highlight significant issues with toxic behavior, bullying, and nepotism within specific teams.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members appreciate the flexible work culture and the ability to maintain a positive work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees express frustration with slow growth, frequent project re-organizations, and limited advancement opportunities.
